item.name: Yanxian Goby
item.description:
Drawn down the One River from the Azim Steppe, these fish grow fat upon the smaller specimens inhabiting spectral currents.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: This species of goby has migrated south from the Azim Steppe. The aether-rich spectral currents are their domain, and they swim through the turbulent waters without challenge.
